heading: Prohibition of public disclosure of proprietary information
label: 4546 Prohibition of public disclosure of proprietary information

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to subsection (d), the Director may, by regulation or order, provide that certain information shall be treated as proprietary information and not subject to disclosure under , , or .section 4543 of this titlesection 1723a(n)(3) of this titlesection 1456(f)(3) of this title

children.heading: Protection of information on housing activities
children.label: b Protection of information on housing activities
children.text: The Director shall not provide public access to, or disclose to the public, any information required to be submitted by an enterprise under or that the Director determines is proprietary.section 1723a(n) of this titlesection 1456(f) of this title

children.heading: Nondisclosure pending consideration
children.label: c Nondisclosure pending consideration
children.text: This section may not be construed to authorize the disclosure of information to, or examination of data by, the public or a representative of any person or agency pending the issuance of a final decision under this section.
the same data from the enterprises that is required of insured depository institutions under the Home Mortgage Disclosure Act of 1975 [ et seq.]; and12 U.S.C. 2801
information collected by the Director under .section 4544(b)(6) of this title
